cards.title: Specification Evidence
cards.governance_note: Define expected behavior, test oracles, invariants, tolerances, and acceptance criteria.

cards.title: Reproducibility Evidence
cards.governance_note: Preserve source version, data snapshot, environment, seed, outputs, and run logs.

cards.title: Runtime Reliability
cards.governance_note: Monitor errors, latency, resources, traces, incidents, security paths, and audit records.
